params.message: Safety event identified in chart and quality report submitted. Please assign primary follow-up owner today for patient/family disclosure, monitoring, and coordination with Risk Management.

data.message: Safety event identified in chart and quality report submitted. Please assign primary follow-up owner today for patient/family disclosure, monitoring, and coordination with Risk Management.

params.text: Safety event reviewed in chart. Event disclosed plan initiated with transparent communication to patient/family, quality reporting completed, and care team notified. Requested assignment of a primary follow-up owner for disclosure completion, ongoing monitoring, and coordination with Risk Management. Care plan updated to include close observation for any sequelae and documentation of follow-up actions.
